text.title: Vector DB Monitoring — Procedure
text.summary: Five steps: scrape config → dashboard → alert rules → runbook + on-call → capacity review cadence.

step.name: scrape-config
step.action: Configure scrape targets. Verify all four pillars surface metric rows.
step.decision-gate: If any pillar missing — fix exporter before continuing (r1-four-pillar-coverage).

step.name: dashboard
step.action: Build dashboard with 4 panels (one per pillar). Overlay SLO thresholds on each panel.
step.decision-gate: If no SLO overlay — fix; operators need that context (r4-slo-panel-on-dashboard).

step.name: alert-rules
step.action: Define page-severity rules (immediate user impact) + ticket-severity rules (degraded but functional). Wire to PagerDuty / Slack.

step.name: runbook-and-oncall
step.action: Author runbook per alert. Test alert routing in staging. Confirm correct on-call paged.
step.decision-gate: If routing test fails — fix before declaring done.

step.name: capacity-review-cadence
step.action: Schedule monthly capacity review. Forecast OOM date; if <30d, file scale ticket.
step.decision-gate: If forecast date trends below 30d for >2 weeks — escalate.
